# Langley Links

> Langley Links is a creator-led platform connecting businesses, people, and purpose across Langley, BC through brand collaborations, events, and community initiatives.

Langley Links has 11K followers and 30M+ content views. It serves businesses and individuals across Langley, the Fraser Valley, and Vancouver Island.

## Pages

- [Home](https://linkslangley-site.linkslangley.workers.dev/): Full platform overview including offerings, about, community, and contact.

## Offerings

- **Brand Collaborations** — Strategic partnerships and campaigns that place your brand where Langley is paying attention.
- **Private & Public Experiences** — Event production from music venues and social gatherings to curated business events.
- **Creative Features** — Editorial storytelling and local coverage highlighting what's happening across Langley.

## Community

- Charitable partnerships spotlighting causes across Langley, Fraser Valley, and Vancouver Island.
- Mental health awareness — messages are open, support is offered freely.
- Direct connection through Instagram (@linkslangley).

## FAQ

- [What does Langley Links offer?](https://linkslangley-site.linkslangley.workers.dev/#services): Brand collaborations, events, and creative editorial features.
- [How do I partner with Langley Links?](https://linkslangley-site.linkslangley.workers.dev/#contact): Call 236-660-6308 or email LinksLangley@gmail.com.

## Contact

- Phone: 236-660-6308
- Email: LinksLangley@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/linkslangley/
